'''Byrga''' served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] to the garrison on [[Vryssa]] as [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with a habit of smacking his lips when nervous.

Sent out in command of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] to prevent [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] from infiltrating the base, Byrga overheard the sound of Fett attaching himself to the walker. Byrga went to investigate only to be killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], who was intent on hijacking the vehicle.

{{Char-stub}}
